query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_published,
  SUM(CASE WHEN facebookPublished = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as nao_no_facebook,
  SUM(CASE WHEN facebookPublished = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ja_no_facebook
FROM posts 
WHERE status = 'published';
